import React from "react"; import { ArrowRight, Bot, Compass, Cpu, Layers3, MessageSquareText, Sparkles, TerminalSquare, Zap } from "lucide-react"; const quickActions = [ { title: "Build", description: "Create applications with AI assistance", shortcut: "⌘B", icon: Zap, accent: "violet", }, { title: "Agents", description: "Manage autonomous workers", shortcut: "⌘A", icon: Bot, accent: "cyan", }, { title: "Composer", description: "Generate and modify code", shortcut: "⌘K", icon: Sparkles, accent: "violet", }, { title: "Intelligence Search", description: "Find anything instantly", shortcut: "⌘⇧F", icon: Compass, accent: "cyan", }, { title: "Terminal", description: "Control your environment", shortcut: "⌘`", icon: TerminalSquare, accent: "violet", }, ]; export default function DevOSHome() { return (
Lightning DevOS

Your AI Development Operating System

Build. Automate. Deploy. Collaborate with intelligent agents inside a calm, premium workstation.

Nuha is ready

3 agents working · optimization suggestions available

14 Active contexts
97% Signal clarity
{quickActions.map(({ title, description, shortcut, icon: Icon, accent }) => ( ))}
); }
